# Code of Conduct

The Mycelium project adopts the **Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct, version 2.1**.

The canonical text is published at:

> https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/

A maintainer should pin the verbatim text alongside this file before the 1.0 release. Until then, the Covenant applies by reference: the version above is the binding text.

## Summary

The Covenant requires that every participant in this project — contributors, maintainers, users seeking help in our channels — interact with respect, free of harassment based on identity or background. The full enforcement policy and examples of expected and unacceptable behavior are in the canonical document linked above.

## Enforcement

Violations may be reported privately to the maintainer team listed in [`../docs/MAINTAINERS.md`](../docs/MAINTAINERS.md). The contact address for Code of Conduct reports is published in `../docs/MAINTAINERS.md`. All reports are reviewed confidentially.

Maintainers will follow the Covenant's *Enforcement Guidelines* (correction, warning, temporary ban, permanent ban) when assessing remediation.

## Scope

This Code of Conduct applies to:

- The Git repository (issues, pull requests, code reviews, commit messages).
- Project communication channels (chat rooms, mailing lists, discussion forums).
- Public events where Mycelium is being represented.
- Any space where someone is identifiable as a Mycelium contributor or maintainer.
